title: Leo's Rescue Attempt
description: Pages 8–12 focus on leo's rescue attempt, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Cavendish, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as mansherry's healing power becomes crucial as Leo and the allies fight to save her from the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Don't you show your face here, Hakuba! I am not about to give in to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Screw you! Go back to sleep, cavern- dish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You don't even understand the meaning or purpose behind this fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: All this means...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I shall carve, shred and tear through all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All this has no meaning unless I do it myself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's almost as if there's two people there talk- ing to each other!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's the fuck- ing poster boy for split personality!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I must!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: No me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No I shall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: NO ME! No I shall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: NO ME! NO I WILL! NO ME! NO I WILL! NO ME! NO I WILL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No me will!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's gone all half-and- half!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Hey! shut it, Hakuba!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I alone am cavern- dish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He really was just half and half back there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: whereze... whereze...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Okay, I should be okay now. Nico Robin, please, release me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Are you sincerely asking me to trust you after that show you put on just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I'll finish you all off now...while I have this opening!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: You lot and the wall you're standing on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Blast away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: If that shit explores we ain't just going to blast off somewhere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Someone's gonna lose a limb...or four!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: That ass- hole!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: He's gonna rapture us along with that wall!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: You should get down from there for the time being, Nico Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: I refuse! What if some- thing happens to Rebecca in the meantime...?

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: I won't let you lay a hand on Robin- Senpai!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Correct decision. If you defeat me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: TwOosh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: The wall won't burst.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Pink hair!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: UUG GHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: What the...!? My legs are... going numb...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Those "Hairs" are actually poison-coated needles.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Barto- Lomeo!

dialogue.speaker: Gladius
dialogue.text: I am a full-body rupture human!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: If you stimulate me in this state, my entire body will burst...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: and thousands of the sort of needles that just pierced you will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Find their homes in those two up above!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Yet if you do not defeat me, the bursting of that wall is inevitable!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Quite the dilemma, no!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Of course, the force of the bursting of my own body will claim your own life as well...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: So no matter what happens, Robin-senpai is going to be attacked!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: Think, Bartolomeo... what's my number one priority!? Robin-senpai's life, right? To stop this wall from blowing...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: I've gotta beat this porcupine bastard! Yet even if I manage that, a huge number of poisonous needles are going to pierce Robin-senpal...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Wait a sec... right next to Robin-senpai is a dude whose life I don't give two shits about!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: OII: Cabbage!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: I'm gonna finish off this porcupine fool so...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: You use your body to shield Robin-senpai from those poison needles! Got it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Hey...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Oi! Cabb...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Shut your mouth, chicken- head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Shit! The scary half's come out to play!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: What a useless fool! Robin- Senpai's really in a pinch now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: What should I do!? What should I do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: That's it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: There's a way I can prevent those needles from flying all the way up there!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: The fact that I can only deploy one barrier at a time is a problem, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: I don't care!

summary: Leo's Rescue Attempt advances the Dressrosa story through Cavendish, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
